ddls:
CREATE TABLE "garment_types" (
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment type (e.g., cardigan, top, pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the garment type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the garment type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the garment type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment type the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "chest_size" REAL /* Specific chest size for the garment */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Specific sleeve length for the garment */,
  "body_length" REAL /* Specific body length for the garment */,
  "waist" REAL /* Specific waist size for the garment */,
  "hip" REAL /* Specific hip size for the garment */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Specific shoulder width for the garment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_sizes_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., Chest (Front) 1"Below Armhole) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., inches) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the measurement (e.g., body, sleeve) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES garment_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_values" (
  "measurement_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement value */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the value belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance range for the measurement value (e.g., ±0.5 inches) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_values_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_values_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES garment_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment design */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment type the design belongs to */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the design */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the design was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the design was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_designs_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design version */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_number" REAL /* Numerical version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_versions_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES garment_designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, manufacturer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment design being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the design */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the design was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES garment_designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_records" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment design being produced */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity produced */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the production took place */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Cost of production for the batch */,
  "quality_check" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if quality check was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the production record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the production record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_records_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES garment_designs ("design_id")
)
